properties.name: Frontline
properties.description: Estimated max extent of solid Russian front

properties.name: Incursion Frontline
properties.description: Shows Russian incursion into Ukraine from Sumy

properties.name: Ukrainian Kharkiv Counterattack
properties.description: Counteroffensive started 6th September 2022 until it stabilised in December 2022. Based on geolocated troop positions and assessments. This polygon covers the area recaptured by Ukraine, plus any incremental adjustments during 2023, 2024, 2025, 2026

properties.name: Ukrainian Kherson Counterattack
properties.description: Began in late August 2022 as a feint to draw units away from Kharkiv. Then large movements began 1st October, until major advances started on 7th November because Russia was retreating from Kherson west bank. Finished by 11/11/22

properties.name: Initial Invasion Kyiv Axis
properties.description: Russian forces invaded Ukraine from the north east in an attempt to take Kyiv on February 24th 2022 until they were repulsed by 2nd April 2022

properties.name: Russian Vovchansk Advances 2026
properties.description: Advances since Jan 1st 2026 in the Vovchansk area

properties.name: Holding Area for Ukrainian Forces
properties.description: Holding area for new units with no locations or units withdrawn from combat, and have not been seen since / Check individual units for last seen location

properties.name: Holding Area for Russian Forces
properties.description: Holding area for new units with no locations or units withdrawn from combat, and have not been seen since / Check individual units for last seen location
